elevators.label: Framingham Elevator 51 (Waverly Street to pedestrian bridge)
Framingham Elevator 50 (Track 1 (outbound platform) to pedestrian bridge)

models.internalNote: Auto-modeled from the agency's own per-elevator location text (rail chain generator, conservative rules). Only listed elevators count as step-free access — an unlisted ramp or grade path would make this over-warn, never under-warn. Street alternate human-approved 2026-07-10 (APPROVED_STREET_ALTERNATES), ≤0.3-mile rule.
models.note: Street/parking to pedestrian bridge: step-free even without an elevator (a non-elevator route exists). Pedestrian bridge to Track 1: step-free even without an elevator (a non-elevator route exists). No single elevator outage removes step-free access on this route. Elevator-free alternative per MBTA's own guidance (a walk is required): MBTA: “Please proceed to Concord street to cross over to the outbound platform.”

elevators.label: South Acton Elevator 704 (Track 1 (outbound platform) to pedestrian bridge)

models.internalNote: Auto-modeled from the agency's own per-elevator location text (rail chain generator, conservative rules). Only listed elevators count as step-free access — an unlisted ramp or grade path would make this over-warn, never under-warn. Note-only disclosure (DISCLOSED_ALTERNATES, human-approved 2026-07-12): real route beyond the 0.3-mile limit, no step-free credit.
models.note: Pedestrian bridge to Track 1: one elevator, no backup. If that elevator is out of service, this route is not step-free. A step-free route exists but is longer than 0.3 miles, so it is not counted as an accessible backup — this platform still shows no step-free access when the elevator is out. Riders able to make the longer walk can follow MBTA's routing: To travel from the Fitchburg platform to the North Station platform, travel to the east end of the platform and proceed down the ramp to the small parking lot. Continue east on Railroad St to Main St. At Main St, turn right and continue to Maple St. At Maple St, turn right and continue to the walkway that leads to the platform. To travel from the North Station platform to the Fitchburg platform, travel east on Maple St towards Main St. At Main St, turn left and continue to Railroad St. At Railroad St, turn left and continue to the station, where a ramp to the Fitchburg platform is located next the small parking lot.

elevators.label: South Acton Elevator 705 (Track 2 (Boston platform) to pedestrian bridge)

models.internalNote: Auto-modeled from the agency's own per-elevator location text (rail chain generator, conservative rules). Only listed elevators count as step-free access — an unlisted ramp or grade path would make this over-warn, never under-warn. models.note: Pedestrian bridge to Track 2: one elevator, no backup. If that elevator is out of service, this route is not step-free. A step-free route exists but is longer than 0.3 miles, so it is not counted as an accessible backup — this platform still shows no step-free access when the elevator is out. Riders able to make the longer walk can follow MBTA's routing: To travel from the North Station platform to the Fitchburg platform, travel east on Maple St towards Main St. At Main St, turn left and continue to Railroad St. At Railroad St, turn left and continue to the station, where a ramp to the Fitchburg platform is located next the small parking lot. To travel from the Fitchburg platform to the North Station platform, travel to the east end of the platform and proceed down the ramp to the small parking lot. Continue east on Railroad St to Main St. At Main St, turn right and continue to Maple St. At Maple St, turn right and continue to the walkway that leads to the platform.
